item.title: Accepted Paper at PACT 2025
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Research on scalable RAG retrieval, presented in our paper “Bit-Level Semantics: Scalable RAG Retrieval with Neurosymbolic Hyperdimensional Computing,” will appear at PACT 2025.
item.content:encoded: Research on scalable RAG retrieval, presented in our paper “Bit-Level Semantics: Scalable RAG Retrieval with Neurosymbolic Hyperdimensional Computing,” will appear at PACT 2025.

item.title: Accepted Paper at DAC 2025, ISCA 2025, SIGMETRICS 2025
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description:
3 papers accepted : DiTTO, a novel diffusion-based framework for generating realistic, configurable, and diverse multi-device storage traces(DAC 2025); FlexNeRFer, an energy-efficient NeRF accelerator (ISCA 2025); a diffusion-based generative-AI surrogate

Continue ReadingAccepted Paper at DAC 2025, ISCA 2025, SIGMETRICS 2025
item.content:encoded: 3 papers accepted : DiTTO, a novel diffusion-based framework for generating realistic, configurable, and diverse multi-device storage traces(DAC 2025); FlexNeRFer, an energy-efficient NeRF accelerator (ISCA 2025); a diffusion-based generative-AI surrogate framework for system optimization (SIGMETRICS 2025)

item.title: Accepted Paper at ICRA 2025, DATE 2025
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description:
3 papers accepted: Reserach on a dynamic-encoding, oversampling HD federated learning framework for mobile robots (ICRA 2025); an HD framework designed with fine-grained feature encoding and a robust training scheme

Continue ReadingAccepted Paper at ICRA 2025, DATE 2025
item.content:encoded: 3 papers accepted: Reserach on a dynamic-encoding, oversampling HD federated learning framework for mobile robots (ICRA 2025); an HD framework designed with fine-grained feature encoding and a robust training scheme to effectively capture complex data patterns(DATE 2025); and a dynamic pruning framework for large language models enabling real-time adaptation with competitive accuracy and improved efficiency (DATE 2025).

item.title: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park, Minsang Kim joined CELL
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park , Minsang Kim joined CELL in the first semester of 2025. Welcome!
item.content:encoded: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park , Minsang Kim joined CELL in the first semester of 2025. Welcome!

item.title: Accepted Paper at ICCD 2024
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Research on efficient forward-only training for Hyperdimensional Computing, introducing SEP and IMP for better encoding adaptability and accuracy, will be presented at ICCD 2024.
item.content:encoded: Research on efficient forward-only training for Hyperdimensional Computing, introducing SEP and IMP for better encoding adaptability and accuracy, will be presented at ICCD 2024.

item.title: Published in ACM TODAES
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Research on improving Hyperdimensional Computing with trainable encoding and adaptive training is published in ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems (TODAES).
item.content:encoded: Research on improving Hyperdimensional Computing with trainable encoding and adaptive training is published in ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems (TODAES).

item.title: Chaitali Bhattacharyya joined CELL
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Chaitali Bhattacharyya in the AI department joined CELL in the second semester of 2024. Welcome!
item.content:encoded: Chaitali Bhattacharyya in the AI department joined CELL in the second semester of 2024. Welcome!

item.title: Accepted paper at ICRA 2024
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Our recent collaboration with Coga Robotics on applying Hyperdimensional Computing to robotic sensorimotor controls has been accepted for presentation at the ICRA’24
item.content:encoded: Our recent collaboration with Coga Robotics on applying Hyperdimensional Computing to robotic sensorimotor controls has been accepted for presentation at the ICRA’24

item.title: Accepted paper at DATE 2024
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Our research on developing a dynamic encoder for Hyperdimensional Computing, which significantly improves accuracy and efficiency, has been accepted for presentation at DATE’24
item.content:encoded: Our research on developing a dynamic encoder for Hyperdimensional Computing, which significantly improves accuracy and efficiency, has been accepted for presentation at DATE’24

item.title: Junyeong Lee, Shinhyoung Jang, Seonha Ryu joined CELL
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Junyeong Lee in the EECS department, Shinhyoung Jang, Seonha Ryu in the AI department joined CELL in the first semester of 2024. Welcome!
item.content:encoded: Junyeong Lee in the EECS department, Shinhyoung Jang, Seonha Ryu in the AI department joined CELL in the first semester of 2024. Welcome!
